reason: First step in the discovery phase: need to understand what feature primitives are available (especially momentum and volatility indicators) before constructing cross-timeframe divergence features
expected_evidence: List of available feature columns with their timeframe support
Confirmation that momentum indicators (e.g., ROC, RSI) exist at both 1h and 5m
Confirmation that volatility indicators (e.g., ATR, standard deviation) exist at both 1h and 5m
